summary: Since the last update, Iran is fortifying its Isfahan nuclear facility entrances. US-Iran tensions escalated in the Strait of Hormuz with US clearing operations and Iranian threats, alongside continued Hezbollah attacks on northern Israel.

top_updates.headline: Iran fortifies entrances of buried nuclear facility
Hezbollah barrages northern Israel with rockets and drones
US 'clearing out' Strait of Hormuz; Iran threatens ships

detailed_analysis: Since the last update, Iran's continued fortification of the Isfahan nuclear facility signals enhanced defense for its program. Escalating US actions in the Strait of Hormuz, met with Iranian threats, indicate increasing maritime tension beyond stalled talks. Meanwhile, Hezbollah's cross-border attacks persist, maintaining pressure on Israel's northern border. The Israel-Hamas conflict continues unresolved, further exacerbating regional instability. Watch for further Strait of Hormuz developments and Iran's nuclear posture.
